name: Captrix platform format switching
description: Verifies platform-aware preview presets for short-form, long-form, and square video formats.

planSteps.description: data-testid=platform-instagram-reels, data-testid=platform-tiktok, data-testid=platform-youtube-shorts, data-testid=platform-youtube-video, data-testid=platform-facebook-video, and data-testid=platform-square-post are visible.
The format metric or export target updates to 1920 x 1080 and the active platform is YouTube.
The format metric updates after each click and the preview remains visible without a page reload.
